title: drynaria leiorhiza
intro: Drynaria leiorhiza, also known as the Chinese tuckahoe or Chinese scalp, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Drynaria leiorhiza include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried powder, decoctions, or infusions, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
